scenarios: features/launch.feature:Launching Estelle boots pi with the Estelle extension active
features/launch.feature:Estelle serves the Shipshape skills from upstream
features/crew-naming.feature:A Crew hand is named from the survivor roster
features/crew-naming.feature:Estelle assigns the Crew name by code before the model runs
features/seat-write-scope.feature:The Crew may write production code
features/seat-write-scope.feature:The Crew may not write a specification
features/seat-write-scope.feature:The Captain may not write production code
features/seat-write-scope.feature:Only the Captain may write the watchbill
features/captain-notes-privacy.feature:The Bosun may read the Captain notes for hygiene
features/captain-notes-privacy.feature:The Quartermaster may not read the Captain notes
features/seat-tool-scope.feature:An internal seat may not address the operator
features/seat-model-selection.feature:The Captain runs on the configured Captain model
features/seat-model-selection.feature:The Quartermaster runs on the configured Quartermaster model
